title: eremanthe patula
intro: Eremanthe patula, also known as the 'Sri Lankan ironwood' or 'Eremanthe', is a flowering plant native to Sri Lanka. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Eremanthe patula has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, such as arthritis, fever, and digestive problems, offering potential health benefits like reduced inflammation and improved immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and bark are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
